GpuAggregateExec: group_by=[l_returnflag], aggr=[sum(lineitem.l_quantity)]
  GpuCoalesceBatchesExec: target_batch_size=22369621
    GpuRepartitionExec: partitioning=Hash([l_returnflag@0], 8), input_partitions=8
      GpuAggregateExec: group_by=[l_returnflag], aggr=[sum(lineitem.l_quantity)]
        GpuScanExec: batch_size=22369621
